name: sammium-nexusops
description: Event-driven business integration platform connecting Stripe, HubSpot, and Slack.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WORKER,WEB -c auto "npm run dev -w @nexus/api" "npm run dev -w @nexus/worker" "npm run dev -w @nexus/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nexus/api && npm run build -w @nexus/worker && npm run build -w @nexus/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @nexus/api && npm run typecheck -w @nexus/worker && npm run typecheck -w @nexus/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @nexus/api && npm run test -w @nexus/worker
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
